title: Yamaguchi, Yamaguchi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Yamaguchi is a city in Yamaguchi with a population of 195,000. A small historic city in western Honshu with a beautiful castle, five-story pagoda, and some of Japan’s lowest living costs.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
